original_abstract: Scholars increasingly rely on new artificial intelligence models for convenience and simple access to necessities due to the rapid evolution of scientific literature and technology. The invention of ChatGPT by OpenAI stands out as a key example of how significant advances in large language model (LLM) technology have recently changed the field of artificial intelligence (AI). Since ChatGPT's development, it has been tested by multiple sectors on various topics to see how well it functions in a natural and conversational mode. The crucial question is how much ChatGPT can influence public policy analysis. In this article, the researcher briefly explains ChatGPT's potential and the difficulties that users, such as researchers or policymakers, may continue to face.
humanized_abstract: Nowadays, numerous scientific studies rely on new artificial intelligence models because of their convenience and the fact that sometimes you don’t have to leave home to buy groceries. The recent evolution of scientific literature and technology made the work of researchers and policymakers easier, which is why the new ChatGPT artificial intelligence model of OpenAI has revolutionized the field of artificial intelligence. The model created by OpenAI was used and tested by numerous entities in various fields of study to assess its performance in chat mode. In this paper we refer to the capabilities of ChatGPT and the challenges that users – researchers, policymakers – still encounter.
